texts: DISEASE: Acanthosis Nigricans (Hindi: एकांथोसिस नाइग्रिकन्स) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Darkened skin in folds, thickened skin DOSHA: Pitta, Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Aloe Vera gel DIET: Apply Aloe Vera gel daily, avoid spicy foods.

DISEASE: Acidity (Hindi: अम्लपित्त) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Heartburn, sour taste, nausea DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Amla, Ajwain — Aloe vera (10ml), Water (200ml) DIET: Avoid spicy foods; eat cooling foods like cucumber.

DISEASE: Acne (Hindi: मुँहासे) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Pimples, blackheads, oily skin DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Neem, Turmeric — Neem leaves (5g), Water (10ml) DIET: Avoid fried foods; include turmeric and green vegetables.

DISEASE: Acne Vulgaris SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: pimples, blackheads, whiteheads, oily skin, facial spots, muhase MEDICINES: Kumkumadi taila (Standard AYUSH Brand) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Holistic management DIET: Warm water, Light digestible food

DISEASE: Acromegaly (Hindi: एक्रोमेगाली) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Enlarged hands/feet, thickened skin DOSHA: Pitta, Kapha MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Brahmi — Ashwagandha (3g daily) DIET: Avoid heavy meals; consume balanced, nutrient-rich foods.

DISEASE: Acute Bronchitis SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: cough with mucus, chest discomfort, mild fever, fatigue, chaati mein balgam MEDICINES: Kantakari Avaleha (Standard AYUSH Brand) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Holistic management DIET: Warm water, Light digestible food

DISEASE: Acute Diarrhea / Gastroenteritis SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: loose watery stools more than 3 per day, abdominal cramps, nausea, vomiting, fever, dast, pet dard ulti MEDICINES: Kutajghan Vati (Baidyanath Kutajghan) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Best Ayurvedic antidiarrheal — Holarrhena antidysenterica Bilva (Bael fruit) powder (Patanjali Bilva Churna) — 5g | Purpose: Classical antidiarrheal, astringent DIET: BRAT diet (Banana Rice Apple Toast), ORS/coconut water, Curd rice, Avoid milk, raw food, spicy food

DISEASE: Acute Kidney Injury (Hindi: तीव्र किडनी क्षति) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Reduced urine output, swelling, confusion DOSHA: Kapha, Pitta MEDICINES: Punarnava, Gokshura — Punarnava (3g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid salty and processed foods; stay hydrated.

DISEASE: Addison's Disease (Hindi: ऐडिसन रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fatigue, weight loss, low blood pressure DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Ashwagandha (5g) DIET: Avoid stress, eat high-protein foods, and manage stress with meditation.

DISEASE: Adrenal Insufficiency (Hindi: अधिवृक्क अपर्याप्तता) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fatigue, low blood pressure, dizziness DOSHA: Pitta, Vata MEDICINES: None specific — Licorice root (2g daily) DIET: Avoid strenuous activities, maintain a balanced diet with healthy fats.

DISEASE: Alkaptonuria (Hindi: अल्काप्टोनुरिया) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Dark urine, arthritis, heart issues DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Vitamin C (500mg daily) DIET: Include antioxidants like berries, avoid processed foods.

DISEASE: Allergic Rhinitis SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: sneezing, runny nose, stuffy nose, itchy nose, watery eyes, chheenk, naak behna MEDICINES: Anu Taila (Dabur Anu Taila) — 2 drops each nostril | Purpose: Nasya to clear sinuses and prevent allergies Haridrakhand (Baidyanath) — 1 tsp | Purpose: Potent anti-allergic formulation DIET: Avoid cold foods, ice cream, curd at night

DISEASE: Allergies (Hindi: एलर्जी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Sneezing, itching, rashes DOSHA: Vata, Kapha MEDICINES: Brahmi, Ashwagandha — Tulsi leaves (5g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid cold foods; include herbal teas in the diet.

DISEASE: Alopecia (Hindi: गंजापन) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Hair loss, thinning of scalp DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Bhringraj, Amla — Bhringraj oil (as needed) DIET: Avoid spicy foods; massage scalp regularly with herbal oils.

DISEASE: Alzheimer's Disease (Hindi: अल्जाइमर रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Memory loss, confusion, difficulty completing tasks DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: Brahmi, Ashwagandha — Brahmi (2g), Ginseng (2g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Support cognitive function with omega-3-rich foods and antioxidants.

DISEASE: Amebiasis (Hindi: एमेबायसिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Abdominal pain, diarrhea, fever DOSHA: Pitta, Kapha MEDICINES: Kutki, Triphala — Pomegranate rind (5g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid raw foods; consume easily digestible meals.

DISEASE: Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) (Hindi: एएमएल (एमायोट्रॉफिक लेटरल स्क्लेरोसिस)) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Muscle weakness, difficulty speaking, swallowing issues DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None — Ashwagandha (5g), Turmeric (1/2 tsp), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Include muscle-supporting foods and anti-inflammatory herbs.

DISEASE: Anemia (Hindi: रक्ताल्पता) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fatigue, pale skin, shortness of breath DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Iron-Rich Foods (Spinach, Red Meat) — Spinach (100g) DIET: Include iron-rich foods, avoid caffeine with meals.

DISEASE: Angina (Hindi: एंजाइना) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Chest pain, shortness of breath, dizziness DOSHA: Vata, Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Hawthorn (5g) DIET: Reduce stress, avoid high-fat foods, regular cardiovascular exercise.

DISEASE: Angina Pectoris SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: chest pain, pressure in chest, pain radiating to arm, shortness of breath, sweating, seene mein dard MEDICINES: Arjunarishta (Standard AYUSH Brand) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Holistic management DIET: Warm water, Light digestible food

DISEASE: Anxiety (Hindi: चिंता) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Restlessness, nervousness, rapid breathing DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Brahmi — Jatamansi (3g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid caffeine; practice mindfulness and relaxation techniques.

DISEASE: Anxiety Disorder (Hindi: चिंता विकार) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Restlessness, excessive worry, irritability DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Brahmi — Brahmi (2g) DIET: Practice deep breathing exercises, limit caffeine, establish a sleep routine.

DISEASE: Aortic Aneurysm (Hindi: एओर्टिक एनीयुरिज़म) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Chest pain, shortness of breath, dizziness DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Ginkgo Biloba (60mg daily) DIET: Avoid strenuous activity, maintain blood pressure with a low-salt diet.

DISEASE: Aphasia (Hindi: अफेजिया) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Difficulty speaking or understanding speech DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Ginseng (1-2g) DIET: Engage in speech therapy, avoid stress, eat a balanced diet.

DISEASE: Appendicitis SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: sudden pain on right side of lower abdomen, nausea, vomiting, fever, loss of appetite, appendix dard MEDICINES: EMERGENCY - No oral meds (Standard AYUSH Brand) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Holistic management DIET: Warm water, Light digestible food

DISEASE: Argininemia (Hindi: आर्जिनिनेमिया) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Muscle weakness, intellectual disability DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: None specific — Brahmi (2g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Include protein-restricted diet; practice stress management.

DISEASE: Argininosuccinic Aciduria (Hindi: आर्जिनिनोस्यूसीनिक एसिड्यूरिया) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Poor growth, intellectual disability DOSHA: Pitta, Vata MEDICINES: None specific — Amalaki (10ml), Water (200ml) DIET: Avoid high-protein foods; consume fresh fruits and vegetables.

DISEASE: Arrhythmia (Hindi: अरिदमिकता) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Enlarged organs, low blood sugar, growth delays DOSHA: Kapha MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Brahmi — Triphala (1 tsp), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid sugary foods; focus on a balanced diet and regular meals.

DISEASE: Arthritis (Hindi: गठिया) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Vision loss, difficulty focusing DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Triphala decoction (5ml) DIET: Avoid eye strain; include Vitamin A-rich foods like carrots.

DISEASE: Rheumatoid Arthritis SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: morning stiffness more than 1 hour, symmetrical small joint swelling, fatigue, fever, rheumatoid nodules, subah akadahat, jodo mein sujan MEDICINES: Yogaraj Guggulu (Baidyanath Yogaraj) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Classical formula for Vata-Ama (RA) Punarnavadi Guggulu (Baidyanath) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Reduces inflammation and swelling

DISEASE: Ascariasis (Hindi: ऐस्केरियासिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Seizures, skin rash, hearing loss DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Amalaki (10ml), Water (200ml) DIET: Include biotin-rich foods like nuts and seeds.

DISEASE: Asparagine Synthetase Deficiency (Hindi: ऐस्पैरेजिन सिंथेटेस की कमी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fever, chest pain, cough DOSHA: Kapha, Pitta MEDICINES: Neem, Turmeric — Turmeric (1/2 tsp), Honey (1 tsp) DIET: Avoid cold foods; consume warm soups and herbal teas.

DISEASE: Aspartylglucosaminuria (Hindi: एस्पार्टाइलग्लूकोसामिन्यूरिया) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Small stature, sensitivity to sunlight, skin rash DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Neem leaves (5g), Water (as needed) DIET: Avoid direct sunlight; apply aloe vera gel for skin care.

DISEASE: Asthma (Hindi: अस्थमा) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Difficulty breathing, wheezing, coughing DOSHA: Vata, Kapha MEDICINES: Tulsi, Ashwagandha — Eucalyptus oil (2 drops in water) DIET: Avoid allergens, practice deep breathing, and consume anti-inflammatory foods.

DISEASE: Atherosclerosis (Hindi: एथेरोस्क्लेरोसिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Chest pain, shortness of breath, dizziness, fatigue DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Arjuna, Guggul — Garlic (2 cloves), Turmeric (1/2 tsp), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Focus on heart-healthy foods like olive oil and leafy greens.

DISEASE: Atopic Dermatitis (Hindi: एटॉपिक डर्मेटाइटिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Red, itchy skin, dry skin DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Neem, Turmeric — Neem leaves (5-6) DIET: Avoid spicy foods, drink plenty of water, use moisturizing oils.

DISEASE: Autoimmune Diseases (e.g., Lupus) (Hindi: ऑटोइम्यून रोग (लुपस जैसे)) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fatigue, joint pain, skin rashes, kidney issues DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Gudmar — Turmeric (1/2 tsp), Ginger (2g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid inflammatory foods, focus on anti-inflammatory and immune-supporting foods.

DISEASE: Autoimmune Hepatitis (Hindi: स्वप्रतिरक्षी हेपेटाइटिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fatigue, jaundice, nausea, abdominal pain DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Turmeric (1 tsp daily) DIET: Avoid alcohol, consume liver-supporting foods like bitter greens.

DISEASE: Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease (Hindi: ऑटोसोमल डॉमिनेंट पॉलीसिस्टिक किडनी रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Lump in breast, skin changes, nipple discharge DOSHA: Kapha MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Guggulu — Ashwagandha (5g daily) DIET: Avoid fatty foods; include antioxidant-rich foods like berries.

DISEASE: B12 Deficiency SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: fatigue, weakness, numbness in hands, tingling in feet, memory loss, naso mein kamzori MEDICINES: Milk (Standard AYUSH Brand) — 2 tabs | Purpose: Holistic management DIET: Warm water, Light digestible food

DISEASE: Back Pain (Hindi: पीठ में दर्द) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Persistent cough, mucus production, chest pain DOSHA: Kapha, Vata MEDICINES: Tulsi, Licorice — Mulethi (3g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid cold drinks; inhale steam with eucalyptus oil.

DISEASE: Bacterial Infections (Hindi: बैक्टीरियल संक्रमण) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fever, chills, fatigue DOSHA: Pitta, Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Garlic (2-3 cloves daily) DIET: Maintain good hygiene, eat immune-boosting foods like ginger and turmeric.

DISEASE: Barth Syndrome (Hindi: बार्थ सिंड्रोम) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fever, joint pain, fatigue DOSHA: Kapha, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Giloy (5g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid raw milk; include immunity-boosting herbs.

DISEASE: Bell's Palsy (Hindi: बेल्स पाल्सी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Facial drooping, loss of taste, difficulty closing eyes DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Vitamin B12 (1000mcg daily) DIET: Manage stress, practice facial exercises, and consume nutrient-rich foods.

DISEASE: Bipolar Disorder (Hindi: द्विध्रुवीय विकार) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Extreme mood swings, depression, mania DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Brahmi — Brahmi (2g daily) DIET: Follow a routine, consume mood-stabilizing foods, and practice relaxation techniques.

DISEASE: Bladder Cancer (Hindi: मूत्राशय का कैंसर) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Painful urination, blood in urine DOSHA: Vata, Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Cranberry (200ml daily) DIET: Drink plenty of water, avoid bladder irritants like caffeine and alcohol.

DISEASE: Brain Tumors (Hindi: मस्तिष्क ट्यूमर) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Headaches, nausea, seizures DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Turmeric (1 tsp daily) DIET: Consume anti-inflammatory foods like turmeric and omega-3s.

DISEASE: Bronchiectasis (Hindi: ब्रोन्कीएकटेसिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Chronic cough, sputum production, wheezing DOSHA: Vata, Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Licorice root (2g daily) DIET: Practice breathing exercises, stay hydrated, and avoid cold air.

DISEASE: Brugada Syndrome (Hindi: ब्रुगाडा सिंड्रोम) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fainting, irregular heartbeat, chest pain DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Arjuna (3g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid stress and caffeine; include magnesium-rich foods.

DISEASE: Bubonic Plague (Hindi: बुबोनिक प्लेग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fever, chills, swollen lymph nodes DOSHA: Kapha, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Neem (5g), Turmeric (2g) DIET: Practice hygiene; avoid crowded places and eat light meals.

DISEASE: Buruli Ulcer (Hindi: बुरुली अल्सर) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Skin ulcers, pain, fever DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Turmeric (1g), Water (as needed) DIET: Avoid spicy foods; clean ulcers with antiseptic solutions.

DISEASE: Canavan Disease (Hindi: कैनावन रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Muscle weakness, difficulty swallowing, seizures DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: None specific — Shankhpushpi (10ml), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Provide a nutrient-dense, balanced diet; avoid stress.

DISEASE: Cancer (Breast Cancer, Lung Cancer, Prostate Cancer, etc.) (Hindi: कैंसर (स्तन, फेफड़ा, प्रोस्टेट, आदि)) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Pain, weight loss, fatigue, lumps or abnormal growths DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Turmeric — Neem leaves (5-6), Turmeric (1/2 tsp), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Eat a nutrient-dense diet, manage stress, avoid alcohol and smoking.

DISEASE: Candidiasis (Hindi: कैंडिडिआसिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Itchy skin, white patches, burning sensation DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Neem, Turmeric — Coconut oil (1-2 tbsp daily) DIET: Avoid sugar, consume probiotic-rich foods like yogurt.

DISEASE: Carbamoyl Phosphate Synthetase I Deficiency Disease (Hindi: कार्बामॉयल फॉस्फेट सिंथेटेज की कमी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Poor feeding, vomiting, lethargy DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Amalaki (10ml), Water (200ml) DIET: Avoid high-protein foods; provide small, frequent meals.

DISEASE: Cardiomyopathy (Hindi: कार्डियोमायोपैथी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fatigue, shortness of breath, swelling of the legs and feet DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: Arjuna, Ashwagandha — Ashwagandha (5g), Garlic (2 cloves), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Follow a low-sodium, heart-healthy diet; manage stress through meditation.

DISEASE: Carpal Tunnel Syndrome (Hindi: कार्पल टनल सिंड्रोम) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Numbness, tingling, hand weakness DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Turmeric — Dashmool oil (as needed) DIET: Avoid repetitive wrist motions; perform hand stretches daily.

DISEASE: Celiac Disease (Hindi: सेलिएक रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Diarrhea, bloating, weight loss DOSHA: Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Avoid gluten-containing foods DIET: Follow a strict gluten-free diet, eat easily digestible foods.

DISEASE: Cerebral Palsy (Hindi: सेरेब्रल पाल्सी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Muscle weakness, spasticity, difficulty with movement DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Magnesium (250mg daily) DIET: Engage in physical therapy, avoid processed foods, and practice gentle yoga.

DISEASE: Cerebrotendinous Xanthomatosis (Hindi: सेरेब्रोटेंडिनस एक्सांथोमेटोसिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Neurological issues, cataracts, tendon xanthomas DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: None specific — Brahmi (2g), Warm milk (200ml) DIET: Include antioxidant-rich foods; avoid fatty foods.

DISEASE: Chagas Disease (Hindi: चागास रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Fever, swelling, fatigue DOSHA: Pitta, Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Neem (3g), Tulsi (3g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid raw foods; maintain proper hygiene and rest.

DISEASE: Chickenpox (Hindi: चिकनपॉक्स) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Itchy rashes, fever, tiredness DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: Neem, Tulsi — Neem leaves (10g), Warm water (bath) DIET: Avoid spicy foods; drink coconut water and stay hydrated.

DISEASE: Chikungunya (Hindi: चिकनगुन्या) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Joint pain, fever, rash DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Guggulu — Giloy (3g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid heavy physical activity; drink warm soups and herbal teas.

DISEASE: Chromoblastomycosis (Hindi: क्रोमोब्लास्टोमाइकोसिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Skin lesions, swelling DOSHA: Kapha, Pitta MEDICINES: Neem, Turmeric — Turmeric (2g), Neem (2g) DIET: Maintain proper hygiene; avoid raw and contaminated foods.

DISEASE: Chronic Fatigue Syndrome (Hindi: पुरानी थकान सिंड्रोम) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Extreme tiredness, muscle aches, sleep problems DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: Ashwagandha, Brahmi — Ashwagandha (5g daily) DIET: Follow a balanced diet with protein and healthy fats, avoid overexertion.

DISEASE: Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD) (Hindi: पुरानी किडनी रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Swelling, fatigue, reduced appetite DOSHA: Kapha, Pitta MEDICINES: Punarnava, Gokshura — Punarnava (5g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid salty foods; drink plenty of water to flush toxins.

DISEASE: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) (Hindi: पुरानी अवरोधक फेफड़े रोग) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Breathlessness, wheezing, fatigue DOSHA: Kapha, Vata MEDICINES: Tulsi, Ginger — Mulethi (3g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid smoking and cold environments; practice pranayama.

DISEASE: Chronic Sinusitis (Hindi: पुरानी साइनसाइटिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Nasal congestion, facial pain, headaches DOSHA: Vata, Kapha MEDICINES: None specific — Eucalyptus oil (2 drops in water) DIET: Inhale steam with eucalyptus, avoid allergens, stay hydrated.

DISEASE: Ciguatera Poisoning (Hindi: सिगुआटेरा विषाक्तता) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Nausea, diarrhea, muscle pain DOSHA: Kapha, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Ginger (2g), Honey (1 tsp) DIET: Stay hydrated; avoid seafood and consume warm foods.

DISEASE: Cirrhosis (Hindi: सिरॉसिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Jaundice, fatigue, abdominal pain DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Milk Thistle (200mg daily) DIET: Avoid alcohol, eat liver-supporting foods like beets and bitter greens.

DISEASE: Cleft Lip and Palate (Hindi: उभयद्वारी ओठ आणि तालू) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Difficulty eating, speech problems DOSHA: Pitta, Vata MEDICINES: None specific — Vitamin A (5000 IU daily) DIET: Follow speech therapy, eat soft foods, and avoid harsh chemicals.

DISEASE: Clinical Depression SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: sadness, hopelessness, loss of interest, fatigue, suicidal thoughts, sleep changes, appetite changes, udas MEDICINES: Brahmi Vati (Divya Brahmi) — 1 tab | Purpose: Nervine tonic Ashwagandha 500mg (Himalaya Ashwagandha) — 1 cap | Purpose: Reduces stress DIET: Sattvic diet, Meditation and Yoga

DISEASE: Clonorchiasis (Hindi: क्लोनोर्कियासिस) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Abdominal pain, jaundice, diarrhea DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Kutki (2g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid fatty foods; include light, easily digestible meals.

DISEASE: Coffin-Lowry Syndrome (Hindi: कॉफिन-लोवरी सिंड्रोम) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Developmental delays, weak muscle tone DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: None specific — Ashwagandha (5g daily) DIET: Provide a balanced, nutrient-rich diet; avoid processed foods.

DISEASE: Cold (Hindi: सर्दी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Sneezing, runny nose, congestion DOSHA: Kapha MEDICINES: Ginger, Tulsi — Ginger (2g), Tulsi (5g), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Avoid cold drinks; drink warm soups and inhale steam regularly.

DISEASE: Cold Sores (Hindi: जुकाम के घाव) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Blisters on lips or around the mouth DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Lemon balm (5g daily) DIET: Avoid stress, apply a cold compress to the affected area, eat antiviral foods.

DISEASE: Colorectal Cancer (Hindi: कोलन कैंसर) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Abdominal pain, blood in stool, weight loss DOSHA: Vata, Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Aloe Vera (2 tbsp) DIET: Increase fiber intake, avoid red and processed meats.

DISEASE: Common Cold (Hindi: सामान्य सर्दी) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Runny nose, sneezing, mild fever DOSHA: Kapha, Vata MEDICINES: Tulsi, Ginger — Tulsi leaves (5), Ginger (1g) DIET: Rest well; consume warm foods; avoid dairy temporarily.

DISEASE: Conjunctivitis (Hindi: नेत्रशोथ) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Red eyes, itchy eyes, eye discharge DOSHA: Pitta MEDICINES: None specific — Chamomile (2g in warm water) DIET: Practice good hygiene, avoid eye irritation, and wear sunglasses.

DISEASE: Constipation (Hindi: कब्ज) SYSTEM: Ayurveda SYMPTOMS: Irregular bowel movements, bloating DOSHA: Vata MEDICINES: Triphala, Ajwain — Isabgol (1 tsp), Warm water (200ml) DIET: Include fiber-rich foods; drink warm water with lemon in the morning.
